title: ColumnStatistics
description: Descriptive statistics for a single column in a dataset.

rowCount.description: Total number of rows in the column

mean.description: Arithmetic mean of the column values (null for non-numeric columns)

median.description: Median value of the column (null for non-numeric columns)

standardDeviation.description: Standard deviation of the column values (null for non-numeric columns)

min.description: Minimum value in the column (null for non-numeric columns)

max.description: Maximum value in the column (null for non-numeric columns)

missingCount.description: Number of missing (null/NaN) values in the column

missingPercentage.description: Percentage of missing values in the column

uniqueCount.description: Number of distinct values in the column

variance.description: Statistical variance of the column values (null for non-numeric columns)

range.description: Difference between the maximum and minimum values (null for non-numeric columns)

percentile05.description: 5th percentile value of the column (null for non-numeric columns)

percentile95.description: 95th percentile value of the column (null for non-numeric columns)

generatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when these statistics were generated
